message:
chore(beads): TUI V3 plan-space review — 16 new beads, dependency fixes, priority elevations

Plan-space review of TUI V3 epic (br-1xt0m):
- Added T0 prerequisite gate (br-241rg) blocking all 10 impl tracks
- Added 9 per-track unit test beads (T1.6, T2.4, T5.3, T6.3, T8.3, T10.2, T11.2, T13.3, T14.3)
- Added 3 E2E test scripts (T15.4 charts, T15.5 rendering, T15.6 interaction)
- Added T11.1/T11.2 (Inspector), T13.1/T13.2 (DnD mouse/keyboard)
- Fixed wrong T4.2->T2.1 dependency (Mermaid renders to Canvas, not markdown)
- Elevated T12 Error Boundaries to P0 (foundation infrastructure)
- Total: 63 V3 beads (1 epic, 15 tracks, 47 subtasks), 0 cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
